characters.name: Boris
characters.description: BorisVoiceTony DanielsCharacter InformationOther namesKid (by Jack)Big guyBig fella (both by Stripes)PersonalityFriendly, genial, happy, jolly, proud, glad, polite, sweet, nice, enthusiastic, optimistic, ambitious, caring, patient, bumbling, humble, warm, kind, loving, huggable, talentedAppearanceLarge, obese, brown fur, round black nose, dark brown mustache and eyebrows, black claws, gray vest with yellow buttons, gray Russian hat with a yellow starOccupationRussian opera singerAlignmentGoodGoalTo work atFast-Talking Jack's Carnival(formerly)To find his own talent (succeeded)HomeRussiaRelativesMentioned motherFriendsMarvin,Eddy Largo,Fast-Talking Jack,Stripes,Elizabeth the Emotional Pig,Diamonds,The Penguin's Five,The Talent ScoutsLikesBig hugs, peeling peanuts, telling Russian stories, making new friends, singing, his motherDislikesNot finding a talent, sadnessTalentsSinging Russian operaFateGoes on a Russian tour with the talent scoutsQuote"I am so happy, you cannot even imagine! Big hugs for everybody!""Yes, yes.  Good idea.""Oh, thank you, thank you!"[Source]Borisis a friendly Russian circus bear looking for work atFast-Talking Jack's Carnival.  He specializes in peeling peanuts, telling stories about Russia and giving people big hugs. His act includes opera singing.  He appeared in "Truth or Bear" where he traveled from his land of Mother Russia to perform in Fast Talking Jack's circus.  He doesn't know what his talent is but Jack does like his spunk.  At first he tries to copy everyone else's act but Eddy tells him instead of copying people, he should find his own talent.  When they hear Boris' singing they realize that is his talent.  His performance is a big hit (it even makes everyone cry) and afterwards is approached by talent scouts who want him to tour around the world.  While hesitant at first, he does so after his friends encourage him to go as this is a once in a lifetime opportunity. He is a won time character but was going appear in future episodes, creations and productions.  Boris is a friendly Russian bear who wants to find his true talent.

When they hear Boris' singing they realize that is his talent.  His performance is a big hit (it even makes everyone cry) and afterwards is approached by talent scouts who want him to tour around the world. characters.description: Carnival InspectorVoiceRon PardoCharacter InformationFull nameUnknown full namePersonalityInspector, curious, perfectionist, niceAppearanceSlender, fair skin, fade olive hair, fade white mustache, round glasses, dark gray suit with black buttons, dark gray hat with a fade blue brim, white shirt, gray necktie, light black shoesOccupationCarnival InspectorAlignmentGoodGoalTo examine carnival cleanlinessFriendsFast-Talking Jack,Marvin,Eddy,Stripes,Elizabeth,DiamondsLikesExamining cleanlinessDislikesDust, trash, messes[Source]The Carnival Inspectoris an inspector whose job is to check and examine carnival cleanliness. If a carnival is not clean and doesn't pass inspection, it will be shut down permanently. He appeared in "Pop Goes the Weasel".

characters.name: Clyde
characters.description: ClydeVoiceRobert Norman SmithCharacter InformationPersonalityAthletic, brotherly, intelligent, nice, caringAppearanceBrownish gray skin, black mane and tail, white bandages on legs and tailOccupationRacehorseAlignmentGoodRelativesMarvin(older brother)Old Chestnut (mentioned uncle)Unknown birth parentsFriendsEddy Largo,Fast-Talking Jack,Stripes,Elizabeth the Emotional Pig,Diamonds,Edna,Sheila B. Shwell,SydneyLikesRacing,Marvinand his star storiesQuote"I can't dance at all.  I've got four left feet.""When we were little,youalways won."[Source]Clydeis a racehorse who isMarvin's younger brother. He appeared in "Marvin Keeps Track" and was shown to be bigger in both size and height due to his racetrack work and similar to Marvin has bandages around his hooves which race horses used.  He and Marvin used to do great things together when they were young and Marvin was always the winner, but now Clyde always beats Marvin or rather creams him. Marvin was not pleased to see him because he had forgotten all about their past and all Clyde wants to race, but then Clyde reminded him. So if it wasn't for Marvin, Clyde would have never been a racehorse.  He also tells Marvin that unlike his brother, he cannot dance and Marvin is great at telling stories. Clyde and Marvin are brothers to one another, despite Marvin getting annoyed at him sometimes and jealous of the fact that Clyde is better at racing than him. Clyde also makes friends with Marvin's gang as he is good to them too. Clyde will make more appearances in future productions, episodes, trailers, promotional tie ins, TV bumpers and creations.

characters.description: Diamonds the ElephantVoiceFiona Reid (USA/CAN)Jules de Jongh (UK)Character InformationOther namesElla Broadbottom (byLyman Slime)Nurse DiamondsMiss DiamondsPersonalityMotherly, friendly, sweet, caring, loving, supportive, amnesiac (temporarily), beautiful, kind, nice, considerate, brave, generous, wise, noble, loyal, helpful, trustworthy, benevolent, selfless, adventurous, cheerful, courageousAppearanceBig pink elephant, blue cloth with yellow star, red trim and yellow tassels, dark pink ears and nailsOccupationJack's Co-workerMain Attraction and friendAlignmentGoodHomeUnknown former homeFast-Talking Jack's CarnivalThe Slime Carnival(briefly)FriendsElizabeth,Marvin,Eddy Largo,Stripes,Fast-Talking Jack,Edna,The Penguin's Five,Dr. Yankem,Mrs. Larue,Car washer,Benny,Lucy,Frisco Frank,Ricochet,Mr. P. Shwell,Sydney,The Shwell GirlsEnemiesLyman Slime,The Slime ClownsLikesPeanuts, ball balancing, stretching, exercise, hanging out withElizabeth,Animal Hospital,Dr. Tusk, her friends, Jack, fruitsDislikesMiceTalentsBalance, strengthWeaponsHer trunk[Source]Diamondsis a main attraction ofFast-Talking Jack's Carnival, next to her close friend Marvin. Her act involves balancing on an inflated beach ball. She was one of the first main characters to be absent in a couple of episodes, just likeFast Talking Jack. Jules de Jongh (UK) Diamonds is a beautiful, kind, nice and friendly pink elephant. She has a big blue cloth on her back with a red outline and a small yellow star as a decoration or patch.

Nutty,Charlotte,Lulabelle Rose,Olaf,Olaf's Parents,Squinty Pete,The Carnival Inspector,The Mayor,Clyde,Andrew,Katie,Boris,Abner,Sheila B. Shwell,Sydney,The Shwell GirlsEnemiesLyman Slime,The Slime Clowns,The Bull,BeesAntsLikesMarvin and his stories, adventures, having fun, carnivals, dancing, yo-yoing, Lucy's Boyfriend, magic tricks, Whomp-A-Weasel, helping others, his friends and familyDislikesBeing embarrassed, jealous, or nervous, his real name, danger, chaos, selfishness, Lyman Slime and the Slime ClownsTalentsYo-yoing, weasel whomping[Source]Edward Larue III (aka Eddy Largo)is a friendly and enthusiastic 9-year-old boy andMarvin's best friend. In thefirst episode, he looks for a job atFast-Talking Jack's Carnivaland is hired as a gofer and all-around assistant to ownerFast-Talking Jack. He changes his name to Eddy Largo because his real name was apparently too bland, long and boring.  He is friends with everyone at the carnival. He is a kind, brave, selfless, considerate, adventurous and nice boy.  While it can be hard for him to speak out, his friends always give him a push in the right direction.  He likes to play with his yo-yo sometimes and can do tricks with them as well.  He can also dance and perform magic tricks as well. He is a good friend to everyone he knows, while he can be shy at times, he always comes out of his shell.  Marvin is one of his best friends. Matt Wilkinson (UK)

characters.name: Edna
characters.description: EdnaVoiceRobin Duke (CAN/USA)Lucy Montgomery (UK)Character InformationOther namesMadame EdnaPersonalityWise, intelligent, omniscient, intuitive, slightly naive and impatient, smart, friendly, kind, motherly, caringAppearanceObese, fair skin, short black curly hair, purple cat eye glasses, gold ring earrings, white shirt with yellow buttons, purple skirt with moon and star patterns(Season 1):Orange headscarf, dark red vest with black buttons, orange socks, dark blue shoes(Season 2):Yellow headscarf, bright green vest with dark green buttons, bright green socks, black shoesOccupationFortune tellerLemon ice sellerAlignmentGoodHomeFast-Talking Jack's CarnivalRelativesEdna's MotherFriendsMarvin,Eddy Largo,Fast-Talking Jack,Elizabeth the Emotional Pig,Stripes,Diamonds,The Penguin's Five,Lucy,Lulabelle Rose,Clyde,Andrew,Katie,Sheila B. Shwell,Sydney,The Shwell GirlsEnemiesLyman Slime,The Slime ClownsLikesTelling fortunes, making lemon ice, shiny objects, helping others, her friends and her motherDislikesLemon juice in her eyesTalentsFortune tellingSinging (temporarily)WeaponsBroomQuote"The fresher they are, the better they sting.""Well, no kidding. Duh. I'm a terrible singer!"[Source] Lucy Montgomery (UK) Ednais a smart fortune teller and makes the lemonade and lemon ice sold at the carnival. She is a stickler for using juice she hand squeezes herself. Her screechy singing voice can break glass.

characters.name: Edna's Mother
characters.description: Edna's MotherVoiceRobin DukeCharacter InformationFull nameUnknown full namePersonalityBoisterous, caringAppearanceAlmost resemblesEdna, wrinkly skin, white curly hair, same shaped glasses as Edna's but pink, bucked teeth, pearl earrings and necklace, pink jacket, light and dark purple dress with a white collar and flower button, carries a brown caneOccupationSnake handlerAlignmentGoodRelativesEdna(daughter)LikesEdna's glass-breaking talentQuote"We want Edna! Bring on Edna!""Yay, Edna! That's my girl. She's a natural."[Source]Edna's motherused to work in a carnival like her daughter. Except she was a snake handler not a fortune teller. Her only appearance was "Edna the Singing Sensation".

characters.name: Elizabeth the Emotional Pig
characters.description: ElizabethVoiceSheila McCarthy (CAN/USA)Teresa Gallagher (UK)Character InformationOther namesFlying pigButterball (byLyman Slime)Juggler (byItchy)PersonalityEmotional, upset, sensitive, sweet, friendly, polite, caring, gentle, cheerful, enthusiastic, optimistic, fun-loving, childlike, naive, visionary, compulsive, cowardly, worried, whiny, mournful, weepy, stern, reckless, kind, thoughtful, nervous, considerate, good-hearted, bossyAppearanceSlender, pink, black beady eyes with eyelashes, turquoise (later lavender) dress with two yellow lines on the skirt with matching buttons, collar flaps and cuffsOccupationJugglerUnicycle RiderJack's co-workerAssistant chef (briefly)AlignmentGoodHomeUnknown former homeFast-Talking Jack's CarnivalFriendsMarvin,Eddy Largo,Diamonds,Stripes,Fast-Talking Jack,Edna,The Penguin's Five,Reginald Q. Farnsworth,Dr. Yankem,Lucy,Frisco Frank,Ricochet,Mr. P. Nutty,Lulabelle Rose,Olaf,Olaf's Parents,The Carnival Inspector,The Mayor,Clyde,Andrew,Katie,Boris,Pete,Abner,Sheila B. Shwell,Sydney,The Shwell GirlsEnemiesLyman Slime,The Slime ClownsLikesJuggling, Unicycle riding, feeling happy, corn on a cob, rainbows, butterflies, birds, puppies, flowers, hanging out withDiamonds, planting, doing laundry, her friendsDislikesFeeling sad, terrible events, the haunted house (formerly),Lyman Slime,The Slime Clowns, people laughing at her talent, people making fun of her.TalentsJuggling and balancingQuote"Oh, dear!""Oh, this is terrible!""I think I'm going to cry.""Oh, you're so thoughful.""And I need my hankies for... for when I... cry!"[Source] Teresa Gallagher (UK) Elizabeth the Emotional Pigis easily upset; she has a tendency to moan and cry. When things go right, she feels ecstatically happy. Her specialty is juggling and riding the unicycle (her act usually consists of both). Usually she juggles pineapples. She also compulsively eats corn on the cob. Pigs like to eat corn in real life. They are also very intelligent and has feelings too. Elizabeth's emotions can sometimes affect all her friends.
